message:
audit: batch 477 — 7 files (~16,375 lines) all SOUND

scope.rs (2370L): structured concurrency scope correct
sleep.rs (1548L): poll-after-completion, waker registration correct
mock.rs (1358L): mock state machine matches real patterns
router.rs (3166L): endpoint routing with TTL correct
budget.rs (1797L): semilattice algebra verified
cx.rs (3410L): checkpoint atomic, mask_depth saturating
steer.rs (726L): out-of-range fails closed

h3_native.rs + postgres.rs agent still running.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
